<!-- cox.zph(HD_non_brain_base_ER)$table %>% -->
<!--   kbl(align = 'ccccc', row.names = T, caption = 'Time from Brc to 1st metastasis in non-brain sites using Baseline ER') %>% -->
<!--   kable_classic(full_width = F, html_font = "Arial", position = "left", font_size = 14) -->

<!-- ggcoxzph(cox.zph(HD_non_brain_base_ER)) -->


<!-- cox.zph(HD_first_non_brain_ER)$table %>% -->
<!--   kbl(align = 'ccccc', row.names = T, caption = 'Time from Brc to 1st metastasis in non-brain sites using time-dependent ER') %>% -->
<!--   kable_classic(full_width = F, html_font = "Arial", position = "left", font_size = 14) -->

<!-- ggcoxzph(cox.zph(HD_first_non_brain_ER)) -->

<!-- cox.zph(HD_brain_base_ER)$table %>% -->
<!--   kbl(align = 'ccccc', row.names = T, caption = 'Time from Brc to 1st metastasis in brain using Baseline ER') %>% -->
<!--   kable_classic(full_width = F, html_font = "Arial", position = "left", font_size = 14) -->

<!-- ggcoxzph(cox.zph(HD_brain_base_ER)) -->

<!-- cox.zph(HD_first_brain_ER)$table %>% -->
<!--   kbl(align = 'ccccc', row.names = T, caption = 'Time from Brc to 1st metastasis in brain using time-dependent ER') %>% -->
<!--   kable_classic(full_width = F, html_font = "Arial", position = "left", font_size = 14) -->

<!-- ggcoxzph(cox.zph(HD_first_brain_ER)) -->

<!-- ``` -->


### ii.PR (Overall Sample: n = 130)
```{r, echo = T, message = F, warning = F}

# PR
cox.1st.base.non.brain2 <- with(base_1st_met, coxph(Surv(Brc.first.met, Event == 1) ~ PR + Race + Age + Stage + cluster(ID), 
                                         na.action = "na.omit", id = ID))



cox.1st.base.brain2 <- with(base_1st_met, coxph(Surv(Brc.first.met, Event == 2) ~ PR + Race + Age + Stage + cluster(ID), 
                                         na.action = "na.omit", id = ID))



cox.1st.HD.non.brain2 <- with(HD_1st_met, coxph(Surv(Tstart, Tstop, Event == 1) ~ PR + Race + Age + Stage + cluster(ID), 
                                         na.action = "na.omit", id = ID))



cox.1st.HD.brain2 <- with(HD_1st_met, coxph(Surv(Tstart, Tstop, Event == 2) ~ PR + Race + Age + Stage + cluster(ID), 
                                         na.action = "na.omit", id = ID))



# get_pool_coef_cox(cox.1st.base.non.brain2) %>% 
#   full_join(get_pool_coef_cox(cox.1st.base.brain2), by = 'Variables') %>% 
#   full_join(get_pool_coef_cox(cox.1st.HD.non.brain2), by = 'Variables') %>% 
#   full_join(get_pool_coef_cox(cox.1st.HD.brain2), by = 'Variables') %>% 
#   kbl(col.names = c("Variable", rep(c('Coefficients [95% CI]', 'p-value'), 4)), format = 'html', align = rep('r', 20),
#       caption = 'Table.4b Cox Regression: time from initial breast cancer to 1st met for PR') %>% 
#   add_header_above(c(" " = 1, "Baseline PR: 1st met at Non-brain site" = 2, "Baseline PR: 1st met at brain site" = 2, 
#                      "Time-dependent PR: 1st met at Non-brain site" = 2, "Time-dependent PR: 1st met at brain site" = 2)) %>% 
#   kable_paper(bootstrap_options = "striped", full_width = T)


# HD_long_PR <- HD_corhort %>%
#   filter(!is.na(PR)) %>%
#   left_join(LMD_cohort %>%
#               mutate(`HR Date` = mdy(`HR Date`)) %>%
#               dplyr::select(1:3, 19, 24, 44:57, 60), by = 'Starr ID') %>%
#   arrange(`Starr ID`, `HR Date`) %>%
#   group_by(`Starr ID`) %>%
#   mutate(`HR Date` = case_when(row_number() == 1 & `HR Date` != Brc.date ~ Brc.date,
#                                T ~ `HR Date`)) %>%
#   distinct(`Starr ID`, `HR Date`, .keep_all = T) %>%
#   mutate(Tstart = as.numeric(difftime(`HR Date`, Brc.date, unit = 'months')),
#          Tstop = lead(Tstart, n = 1L),
#          Location = tolower(Location),
#          First.brain.or.LMD = ifelse(is.na(First.brain), First.LMD, First.brain))
# 
# test <- HD_long_PR %>%
#   group_by(`Starr ID`) %>%
#   filter(`HR Date` != Brc.date & row_number() == 1)

# HD_long <- LMD_cohort %>%
#   mutate(`HR Date` = mdy(`HR Date`)) %>%
#   dplyr::select(1:3, 13:18, 18, 24, 44:57, 60)
#   left_join(HD_corhort %>% dplyr::select(1, 11:15), by = 'Starr ID') %>%
#   mutate(`HR Date` = case_when(is.na(`HR Date.y`) ~ `HR Date.x`,
#                                T ~ `HR Date.y`),
#          PR = case_when(is.na(PR.y) ~ PR.x,
#                         T ~ PR.y),
#          PR = case_when(is.na(PR.y) ~ PR.x,
#                         T ~ PR.y),
#          HPR2 = case_when(is.na(HPR2.y) ~ HPR2.x,
#                           T ~ HPR2.y),
#          Location= case_when(is.na(Location.y) ~ Location.x,
#                              T ~ Location.y)) %>%
#   dplyr::select(-c('HR Date.x', 'HR Date.y', 'PR.x', 'PR.y', 'PR.x', 'PR.y', 'HPR2.x', 'HPR2.y', 'Location.x', 'Location.y')) %>%
#   arrange(`Starr ID`, `HR Date`) %>%
#   group_by(`Starr ID`) %>%
#   distinct(`Starr ID`, `HR Date`, .keep_all = T) %>%
#   mutate(Tstart = as.numPRic(difftime(`HR Date`, Brc.date, unit = 'months')),
#          Tstop = lead(Tstart, n = 1L),
#          Location = tolowPR(Location),
#          First.brain.or.LMD = ifelse(is.na(First.brain), First.LMD, First.brain))



# HD_long <- HD_corhort %>%
#   dplyr::select(1, 11:15) %>%
#   left_join(LMD_cohort %>%
#               dplyr::select(1:3, 24, 44:57, 60), by = 'Starr ID') %>%
#   mutate(`HR Date` = as.Date(`HR Date`, format = '')) %>%
#   arrange(`Starr ID`, `HR Date`) %>%
#   group_by(`Starr ID`) %>%
#   distinct(`HR Date`, .keep_all = T) %>%
#   mutate(Tstart = as.numPRic(difftime(`HR Date`, First.met.date, unit = 'months')),
#          Tstop = lead(Tstart, n = 1L),
#          Location = tolowPR(Location),
#          First.brain.or.LMD = ifelse(is.na(First.brain), First.LMD, First.brain))


# HD_first_to_brain <- HD_long %>%
#   filter(First.met.bi.LMD == 'Non-Brain' & First.brain.or.LMD > Tstart & Tstart >= 0) %>%
#   mutate(Tstop = ifelse(First.brain.or.LMD < Tstop & row_number() == n() | is.na(Tstop), First.brain.or.LMD, Tstop),
#          Event = ifelse(row_number() == n(), 1, 0)) %>%
#   as.data.frame()
#
# coxph(Surv(Tstart, Tstop, Event) ~ PR + clustPR(`Starr ID`),
#             data = HD_first_to_brain, na.action = "na.omit", id = `Starr ID`)

# check_PR <- HD_long_PR %>%
#   dplyr::select(1:5, Brc.first.met, Tstart, Tstop)
# 
# HD_first_met_PR <- HD_long_PR %>%
#   filter(Brc.first.met > Tstart) %>%
#   mutate(Tstop = ifelse(Brc.first.met < Tstop & row_number() == n() | is.na(Tstop), Brc.first.met, Tstop),
#          Event = case_when(First.met.bi.LMD == 'Non-Brain' & row_number() == n() ~ 1,
#                            First.met.bi.LMD == 'Brain' & row_number() == n() ~ 2,
#                            T ~ 0)) %>%
#   # mutate(PR = ifelse(PR == 'Positive', 0, 1)) %>%
#   as.data.frame()
# 
# 
# 
# HD_first_met_base_PR <- HD_first_met_PR %>%
#   group_by(`Starr ID`) %>%
#   filter(row_number() == 1) %>%
#   as.data.frame()
# 
# 
# 
# check_90d <- check_PR %>%
#   filter(Brc.first.met <= 90)
# 
# 
# 
# HD_non_brain_base_PR <- coxph(Surv(Brc.first.met, Event == 1) ~ PR + Race + Age + Stage, data = HD_first_met_base_PR, na.action = "na.omit")
# 
# 
# HD_brain_base_PR <- coxph(Surv(Brc.first.met, Event == 2) ~ PR + Race + Age + Stage, data = HD_first_met_base_PR, na.action = "na.omit")
# 
# 
# HD_first_non_brain_PR <- coxph(Surv(Tstart, Tstop, Event == 1) ~ PR + Race + Age + Stage + cluster(`Starr ID`),
#             data = HD_first_met_PR, id = `Starr ID`)
# 
# 
# HD_first_brain_PR <- coxph(Surv(Tstart, Tstop, Event == 2) ~ PR + Race + Age + Stage + cluster(`Starr ID`),
#             data = HD_first_met_PR, na.action = "na.omit", id = `Starr ID`)
# 
# HD_cox <- list(HD_non_brain_base_PR, HD_brain_base_PR, HD_first_non_brain_PR, HD_first_brain_PR)
# 
# 
# get_hr_HD_cox <- function(fm) {
#   summary(fm)$coefficients[, 2]
# }
# 
# get_pvals_HD_cox <- function(fm) {
#   summary(fm)$coefficients[, 6]
# }
# 
# get_ci_HD_cox <- function(fm) {
#   exp(confint(fm))
# }
# 
# 
# hr_HD_cox <- lapply(HD_cox, get_hr_HD_cox)
# pvals_HD_cox <- c(lapply(HD_cox[1:2], get_pvals_cox), lapply(HD_cox[3:4], get_pvals_HD_cox))
# ci_HD_cox <- lapply(HD_cox, get_ci_HD_cox)


# HD_first_met <- HD_long %>%
#   filter(Brc.first.met > Tstart) %>%
#   mutate(Tstop = ifelse(Brc.first.met < Tstop & row_number() == n() | is.na(Tstop), Brc.first.met, Tstop),
#          Event_non_brain = ifelse(First.met.bi.LMD == 'Non-Brain' & row_number() == n(), 1, 0),
#          Event_brain = ifelse(First.met.bi.LMD == 'Brain' & row_number() == n(), 1, 0)) %>%
#   as.data.frame()
#
#
# HD_first_non_brain <- coxph(Surv(Tstart, Tstop, Event_non_brain) ~ ER + cluster(`Starr ID`),
#             data = HD_first_met, na.action = "na.omit", id = `Starr ID`)
#
# HD_first_brain <- coxph(Surv(Tstart, Tstop, Event_brain) ~ ER + cluster(`Starr ID`),
#             data = HD_first_met, na.action = "na.omit", id = `Starr ID`)
#
# summary(HD_first_non_brain)
#
# summary(HD_first_brain)
```

```{r, echo = T, message = F, warning = F, fig.width = 10, fig.height = 7}
get_pool_coef_cox(cox.1st.base.non.brain2) %>% 
  full_join(get_pool_coef_cox(cox.1st.base.brain2), by = 'Variables') %>% 
  full_join(get_pool_coef_cox(cox.1st.HD.non.brain2), by = 'Variables') %>% 
  full_join(get_pool_coef_cox(cox.1st.HD.brain2), by = 'Variables') %>% 
  kbl(col.names = c("Variable", rep(c('Coefficients [95% CI]', 'p-value'), 4)), format = 'html', align = rep('r', 20),
      caption = 'Table.4b Cox Regression: time from initial breast cancer to 1st met for PR') %>% 
  add_header_above(c(" " = 1, "Baseline PR: 1st met at Non-brain site" = 2, "Baseline PR: 1st met at brain site" = 2, 
                     "Time-dependent PR: 1st met at Non-brain site" = 2, "Time-dependent PR: 1st met at brain site" = 2)) %>% 
  kable_paper(bootstrap_options = "striped", full_width = T)
```
#### Summary
- Stage 4 is significant across all models.
- Baseline and time-dependent PR is significant in the model examining time to 1st metastasis as brain metastasis.
- The result of the model with baseline PR demonstrated that the PR- is associated with higher risk of 1st metastasis in brain, adjusting for race, age and stage, at any possible time before the event, even if there is 1 or multiple switch.
- Sample interpretation: The present of PR- is associated with a 110% increased risk of 1st metastasis in brain, adjusting for age, race and stage, as compared to ER+.
- The result of the model with time-dependent ER demonstrated that the PR- is associated with higher risk of 1st metastasis in brain, adjusting for race, age and stage, at any possible time before the event, even if there is 1 or multiple switch.
- Sample interpretation: After considering the PR status over time, the present of PR- is associated with a 180% increased risk of 1st metastasis in brain, adjusting for age, race and stage, as compared to PR+.

<!-- ```{r, echo = T, message = F, warning = F, results = 'asis', fig.width = 10, fig.height = 7} -->
<!-- ggadjustedcurves(HD_non_brain_base_PR, data = HD_first_met_base_PR, method = "conditional", variable="PR") + -->
<!--   scale_colour_manual(name  ="PR", values = c("#E7B800", "#2E9FDF")) + -->
<!--   labs(y = 'Survival Probability', title = 'Time from Brc to 1st metastasis as non-brain metastasis, using Baseline PR') -->

<!-- ggadjustedcurves(HD_first_non_brain_PR, data = HD_first_met_PR, method = "conditional", variable="PR") + -->
<!--   scale_colour_manual(name  ="PR", values = c("#E7B800", "#2E9FDF")) + -->
<!--   labs(y = 'Survival Probability', title = 'Time from Brc to 1st metastasis as non-brain metastasis, using time-dependent PR') -->

<!-- ggadjustedcurves(HD_brain_base_PR, data = HD_first_met_base_PR, method = "conditional", variable="PR") + -->
<!--   scale_colour_manual(name  ="PR", values = c("#E7B800", "#2E9FDF")) + -->
<!--   labs(y = 'Survival Probability', title = 'Time from Brc to 1st metastasis as brain metastasis including LMD, using Baseline PR') -->

<!-- ggadjustedcurves(HD_first_brain_PR, data = HD_first_met_PR, method = "conditional", variable="PR") + -->
<!--   scale_colour_manual(name  ="PR", values = c("#E7B800", "#2E9FDF")) + -->
<!--   labs(y = 'Survival Probability', title = 'Time from Brc to 1st metastasis as brain metastasis including LMD, using time-dependent PR') -->
<!-- ``` -->


<!-- #### Check if the assumption of proportional hazard holds -->

<!-- ```{r, echo = T, message = F, warning = F} -->
<!-- cox.zph(HD_non_brain_base_PR)$table %>% -->
<!--   kbl(align = 'ccccc', row.names = T, caption = 'Time from Brc to 1st metastasis in non-brain sites using Baseline PR') %>% -->
<!--   kable_classic(full_width = F, html_font = "Arial", position = "left", font_size = 14) -->

<!-- ggcoxzph(cox.zph(HD_non_brain_base_PR)) -->


<!-- cox.zph(HD_first_non_brain_PR)$table %>% -->
<!--   kbl(align = 'ccccc', row.names = T, caption = 'Time from Brc to 1st metastasis in non-brain sites using time-dependent PR') %>% -->
<!--   kable_classic(full_width = F, html_font = "Arial", position = "left", font_size = 14) -->

<!-- ggcoxzph(cox.zph(HD_first_non_brain_PR)) -->

<!-- cox.zph(HD_brain_base_PR)$table %>% -->
<!--   kbl(align = 'ccccc', row.names = T, caption = 'Time from Brc to 1st metastasis in brain using Baseline PR') %>% -->
<!--   kable_classic(full_width = F, html_font = "Arial", position = "left", font_size = 14) -->

<!-- ggcoxzph(cox.zph(HD_brain_base_PR)) -->

<!-- cox.zph(HD_first_brain_PR)$table %>% -->
<!--   kbl(align = 'ccccc', row.names = T, caption = 'Time from Brc to 1st metastasis in brain using time-dependent PR') %>% -->
<!--   kable_classic(full_width = F, html_font = "Arial", position = "left", font_size = 14) -->

<!-- ggcoxzph(cox.zph(HD_first_brain_PR)) -->

<!-- ``` -->


### iii. Additional analysis (Outcome = Time from Brc to brain metastsis or LMD, subgroups = patients who had 1st metastatsis as non-brain metastasis or brain metastasis)

### KM plots by ER, PR and HER2 status (Brc to LMD)

```{r, echo = T, message = F, warning = F, fig.width = 10, fig.height = 7}
# Some covariates of interest

LMD_cohort <- LMD_cohort %>% mutate(Event = 1)

fit_er <- survfit(Surv(Brc.LMD, Event) ~ ER, data = LMD_cohort)
fit_pr <- survfit(Surv(Brc.LMD, Event) ~ PR, data = LMD_cohort)
fit_her2 <- survfit(Surv(Brc.LMD, Event) ~ HER2, data = LMD_cohort)

ggsurvplot(
  fit_er,
  data = LMD_cohort,
  size = 1,                 # change line size
  palette =
    c("#E7B800", "#2E9FDF"),# custom color palettes
  conf.int = TRUE,          # Add confidence interval
  pval = TRUE,              # Add p-value
  risk.table = TRUE,        # Add risk table
  risk.table.col = "strata",# Risk table color by groups
  legend.labs =
    c("Positive", "Negative"),  # Change legend labels
  legend.title = 'ER Status',
  risk.table.height = 0.2, # Useful to change when you have multiple groups
  ggtheme = theme_bw(),      # Change ggplot2 theme
  font.title = c(22, "bold"),
  font.subtitle = c(21, "bold.italic"),
  font.caption = c(19, "plain"),
  font.x = c(19, "bold.italic"),
  font.y = c(19, "bold.italic"),
  font.tickslab = c(18, "plain"),
  font.legend = c(18, "plain"),
  fontsize = 6
)

ggsurvplot(
  fit_pr,
  data = LMD_cohort,
  size = 1,                 # change line size
  palette =
    c("#E7B800", "#2E9FDF"),# custom color palettes
  conf.int = TRUE,          # Add confidence interval
  pval = TRUE,              # Add p-value
  risk.table = TRUE,        # Add risk table
  risk.table.col = "strata",# Risk table color by groups
  legend.labs =
    c("Positive", "Negative"),    # Change legend labels
  legend.title = 'PR Status',
  risk.table.height = 0.2, # Useful to change when you have multiple groups
  ggtheme = theme_bw(),      # Change ggplot2 theme
  font.title = c(22, "bold"),
  font.subtitle = c(21, "bold.italic"),
  font.caption = c(19, "plain"),
  font.x = c(19, "bold.italic"),
  font.y = c(19, "bold.italic"),
  font.tickslab = c(18, "plain"),
  font.legend = c(18, "plain"),
  fontsize = 6
)

ggsurvplot(
  fit_her2,
  data = LMD_cohort,
  size = 1,                 # change line size
  palette =
    c("#E7B800", "#2E9FDF"),# custom color palettes
  conf.int = TRUE,          # Add confidence interval
  pval = TRUE,              # Add p-value
  risk.table = TRUE,        # Add risk table
  risk.table.col = "strata",# Risk table color by groups
  legend.labs =
    c("Positive", "Negative"),    # Change legend labels
  legend.title = 'HER2 Status',
  risk.table.height = 0.2, # Useful to change when you have multiple groups
  ggtheme = theme_bw(),      # Change ggplot2 theme
  font.title = c(22, "bold"),
  font.subtitle = c(21, "bold.italic"),
  font.caption = c(19, "plain"),
  font.x = c(19, "bold.italic"),
  font.y = c(19, "bold.italic"),
  font.tickslab = c(18, "plain"),
  font.legend = c(18, "plain"),
  fontsize = 6
)
```


### ER (n = 137)
```{r, echo = T, message = F, warning = F}

# ER
cox.base.lmd <- with(base_HD_LMD, coxph(Surv(Brc.LMD, Event) ~ ER + First.met.brain + First.met.non.brain + Race + Age + Stage + cluster(ID), 
                                         na.action = "na.omit", id = ID))




cox.HD.lmd <- with(HD_LMD, coxph(Surv(Tstart, Tstop, Event) ~ ER + First.met.brain + First.met.non.brain + Race + Age + Stage + cluster(ID), 
                                         na.action = "na.omit", id = ID))


# cox.base.lmd <- with(base_HD_LMD, coxph(Surv(Brc.LMD, Event) ~ ER + First.met.state + Race + Age + Stage + cluster(ID), 
#                                          na.action = "na.omit", id = ID))
# 
# 
# 
# 
# cox.HD.lmd1 <- with(HD_LMD, coxph(Surv(Tstart, Tstop, Event) ~ ER + First.met.state + Race + Age + Stage + cluster(ID), 
#                                          na.action = "na.omit", id = ID))
# 
# get_pool_coef_cox <- function(fit){
#   sum <- summary(pool(fit), conf.int=T)
#   cbind.data.frame('Variables' = sum[, 1], 'Coefficients [95% CI]' = paste0(round(exp(sum[, "estimate"]), 1), ' [', round(exp(sum[, "2.5 %"]), 1), ', ', round(exp(sum[, "97.5 %"]), 1), ']'), 
#         'p-value' = round(sum[, 'p.value'], 3))
# }
# 
# get_pool_coef_cox(cox.HD.lmd)
# get_pool_coef_cox(cox.HD.lmd1)

# HD_sub_ER <- HD_long_ER %>%
#   filter(First.met.bi.LMD == 'Non-Brain' & Location != 'brain') %>%
#   filter(min(Brc.brain, Brc.LMD, na.rm = T) > Tstart) %>%
#   mutate(Time_Brain_or_LMD = min(Brc.brain, Brc.LMD, na.rm = T),
#          Tstop = ifelse(min(Brc.brain, Brc.LMD, na.rm = T) < Tstop & row_number() == n() | is.na(Tstop), min(Brc.brain, Brc.LMD, na.rm = T), Tstop),
#          Event = 1) %>%
#   as.data.frame()
# 
# HD_sub_base_ER <- HD_sub_ER %>%
#   group_by(`Starr ID`) %>%
#   filter(row_number() == 1) %>%
#   as.data.frame()
# 
# cox_sub_base_ER <- coxph(Surv(Time_Brain_or_LMD, Event) ~ ER + Race + Age + Stage, data = HD_sub_base_ER, na.action = "na.omit")
# 
# cox_sub_ER <- coxph(Surv(Tstart, Tstop, Event) ~ ER + Race + Age + Stage + cluster(`Starr ID`),
#             data = HD_sub_ER, na.action = "na.omit", id = `Starr ID`)
# 
# HD_sub_cox <- list(cox_sub_base_ER, cox_sub_ER)
# 
# 
# get_hr_HD_cox <- function(fm) {
#   summary(fm)$coefficients[, 2]
# }
# 
# get_pvals_HD_cox <- function(fm) {
#   summary(fm)$coefficients[, 6]
# }
# 
# get_ci_HD_cox <- function(fm) {
#   exp(confint(fm))
# }
# 
# 
# hr_HD_cox <- lapply(HD_sub_cox, get_hr_HD_cox)
# pvals_HD_cox <- c(lapply(HD_sub_cox[1], get_pvals_cox), lapply(HD_sub_cox[2], get_pvals_HD_cox))
# ci_HD_cox <- lapply(HD_sub_cox, get_ci_HD_cox)

```

```{r, echo = T, message = F, warning = F, fig.width = 10, fig.height = 7}
# get_pool_coef_cox(cox.base.lmd.subgroup1) %>% 
#   full_join(get_pool_coef_cox(cox.HD.lmd.subgroup1), by = 'Variables') %>% 
#   kbl(col.names = c("Variable", rep(c('Coefficients [95% CI]', 'p-value'), 2)), format = 'html', align = rep('r', 20),
#       caption = 'Table.5a Cox Regression: time from initial breast cancer to LMD by 1st met location (Non brain vs. Brain) for ER') %>% 
#   add_header_above(c(" " = 1, "Baseline ER * 1st met location + Race + Age + Stage" = 2, 
#                      "Time-dependent ER * 1st met location + Race + Age + Stage" = 2)) %>% 
#   kable_paper(bootstrap_options = "striped", full_width = T)

get_pool_coef_cox(cox.base.lmd) %>% 
  full_join(get_pool_coef_cox(cox.HD.lmd), by = 'Variables') %>% 
  kbl(col.names = c("Variable", rep(c('Coefficients [95% CI]', 'p-value'), 2)), format = 'html', align = rep('r', 20),
      caption = 'Table.5a Cox Regression: time from initial breast cancer to LMD by 1st met location (Non brain vs. Brain) for ER') %>% 
  add_header_above(c(" " = 1, "Baseline ER + Baseline 1st met in brain + Baseline 1st met in non-brain + Race + Age + Stage" = 2, 
                     "Time-dependent ER + Time-dependent 1st met in brain + Time-dependent 1st met in non-brain + Race + Age + Stage" = 2)) %>% 
  kable_paper(bootstrap_options = "striped", full_width = T)
```

#### Summary
- ER is significant in both model.
- 1st met in brain is significant in both model, while 1st met in non-brain is significant only in mdoel with time-dependent ER and 1st met location.
- HR decreased when including ER as time-dependent.
- Sample interpretation 1: Having 1st met in brain is associated with a 140% increased in hazard of LMD, adjusting for age, race, stage and ER, as compared to not having any 1st met yet at any given time point.
- Sample interpretation 2: Having 1st met in non-brain is associated with a 60% increased in hazard of LMD, adjusting for age, race, stage and ER, as compared to not having any 1st met yet at any given time point.

<!-- ```{r, echo = T, message = F, warning = F, results = 'asis', fig.width = 10, fig.height = 7} -->
<!-- ggadjustedcurves(cox_sub_base_ER, data = HD_first_met_base_PR, method = "conditional", variable="ER") + -->
<!--   scale_colour_manual(name  ="PR", values = c("#E7B800", "#2E9FDF")) + -->
<!--   labs(y = 'Survival Probability', title = 'Time from Brc to non-brain metastasis or LMD, using time-dependent ER') -->

<!-- ggadjustedcurves(cox_sub_ER, data = HD_first_met_PR, method = "conditional", variable="ER") + -->
<!--   scale_colour_manual(name  ="PR", values = c("#E7B800", "#2E9FDF")) + -->
<!--   labs(y = 'Survival Probability', title = 'Time from Brc to non-brain metastasis or LMD, using time-dependent ER') -->

<!-- ``` -->


<!-- #### Check if the assumption of proportional hazard holds -->

<!-- ```{r, echo = T, message = F, warning = F} -->
<!-- cox.zph(cox_sub_base_ER)$table %>% -->
<!--   kbl(align = 'ccccc', row.names = T, caption = 'Time from Brc to 1st metastasis in non-brain sites using Baseline ER') %>% -->
<!--   kable_classic(full_width = F, html_font = "Arial", position = "left", font_size = 14) -->

<!-- ggcoxzph(cox.zph(cox_sub_base_ER)) -->


<!-- cox.zph(cox_sub_ER)$table %>% -->
<!--   kbl(align = 'ccccc', row.names = T, caption = 'Time from Brc to 1st metastasis in non-brain sites using time-dependent ER') %>% -->
<!--   kable_classic(full_width = F, html_font = "Arial", position = "left", font_size = 14) -->

<!-- ggcoxzph(cox.zph(cox_sub_ER)) -->

<!-- ``` -->


### PR (n = 137)
```{r, echo = T, message = F, warning = F}


# PR
cox.base.lmd <- with(base_HD_LMD, coxph(Surv(Brc.LMD, Event) ~ PR + First.met.brain + First.met.non.brain + Race + Age + Stage + cluster(ID), 
                                         na.action = "na.omit", id = ID))

cox.HD.lmd <- with(HD_LMD, coxph(Surv(Tstart, Tstop, Event) ~ PR + First.met.brain + First.met.non.brain + Race + Age + Stage + cluster(ID), 
                                         na.action = "na.omit", id = ID))




# cox.base.lmd.subgroup2 <- with(base_HD_LMD, coxph(Surv(Brc.LMD, Event) ~ PR*First.met.site + Race + Age + Stage + cluster(ID), 
#                                          na.action = "na.omit", id = ID))
# 
# 
# 
# cox.HD.lmd.subgroup2 <- with(HD_LMD, coxph(Surv(Tstart, Tstop, Event) ~ PR*First.met.site + Race + Age + Stage + cluster(ID), 
#                                          na.action = "na.omit", id = ID))






# HD_sub_PR <- HD_long_PR %>%
#   filter(First.met.bi.LMD == 'Non-Brain' & Location != 'brain') %>%
#   filter(min(Brc.brain, Brc.LMD, na.rm = T) > Tstart) %>%
#   mutate(Time_Brain_or_LMD = min(Brc.brain, Brc.LMD, na.rm = T),
#          Tstop = ifelse(min(Brc.brain, Brc.LMD, na.rm = T) < Tstop & row_number() == n() | is.na(Tstop), min(Brc.brain, Brc.LMD, na.rm = T), Tstop),
#          Event = 1) %>%
#   as.data.frame()
# 
# HD_sub_base_PR <- HD_sub_PR %>%
#   group_by(`Starr ID`) %>%
#   filter(row_number() == 1) %>%
#   as.data.frame()
# 
# cox_sub_base_PR <- coxph(Surv(Time_Brain_or_LMD, Event) ~ PR + Race + Age + Stage, data = HD_sub_base_PR, na.action = "na.omit")
# summary(cox_sub_base_PR)
# 
# cox_sub_PR <- coxph(Surv(Tstart, Tstop, Event) ~ PR + Race + Age + Stage + cluster(`Starr ID`),
#             data = HD_sub_PR, na.action = "na.omit", id = `Starr ID`)
# summary(cox_sub_PR)
# 
# HD_sub_cox <- list(cox_sub_base_PR, cox_sub_PR)
# 
# 
# get_hr_HD_cox <- function(fm) {
#   summary(fm)$coefficients[, 2]
# }
# 
# get_pvals_HD_cox <- function(fm) {
#   summary(fm)$coefficients[, 6]
# }
# 
# get_ci_HD_cox <- function(fm) {
#   exp(confint(fm))
# }
# 
# 
# hr_HD_cox <- lapply(HD_sub_cox, get_hr_HD_cox)
# pvals_HD_cox <- c(lapply(HD_sub_cox[1], get_pvals_cox), lapply(HD_sub_cox[2], get_pvals_HD_cox))
# ci_HD_cox <- lapply(HD_sub_cox, get_ci_HD_cox)

```

```{r, echo = T, message = F, warning = F, fig.width = 10, fig.height = 7}
# get_pool_coef_cox(cox.base.lmd.subgroup2) %>% 
#   full_join(get_pool_coef_cox(cox.HD.lmd.subgroup2), by = 'Variables') %>% 
#   kbl(col.names = c("Variable", rep(c('Coefficients [95% CI]', 'p-value'), 2)), format = 'html', align = rep('r', 20), 
#       caption = 'Table.5b Cox Regression: time from initial breast cancer to LMD by 1st met location (Non brain vs. Brain) for ER') %>% 
#   add_header_above(c(" " = 1, "Baseline PR * 1st met location + Race + Age + Stage" = 2, 
#                      "Time-dependent PR * 1st met location + Race + Age + Stage" = 2)) %>% 
#   kable_paper(bootstrap_options = "striped", full_width = T)

get_pool_coef_cox(cox.base.lmd) %>% 
  full_join(get_pool_coef_cox(cox.HD.lmd), by = 'Variables') %>% 
  kbl(col.names = c("Variable", rep(c('Coefficients [95% CI]', 'p-value'), 2)), format = 'html', align = rep('r', 20),
      caption = 'Table.5b Cox Regression: time from initial breast cancer to LMD by 1st met location (Non brain vs. Brain) for PR') %>% 
  add_header_above(c(" " = 1, "Baseline PR + Baseline 1st met in brain + Baseline 1st met in non-brain + Race + Age + Stage" = 2, 
                     "Time-dependent PR + Time-dependent 1st met in brain + Time-dependent 1st met in non-brain + Race + Age + Stage" = 2)) %>% 
  kable_paper(bootstrap_options = "striped", full_width = T)
```

#### Summary
- PR is significant in both model.
- 1st met in brain is significant in both model, while 1st met in non-brain is significant only in mdoel with time-dependent PR and 1st met location.
- HR decreased when including PR as time-dependent.
- Sample interpretation 1: Having 1st met in brain is associated with a 140% increased in hazard of LMD, adjusting for age, race, stage and PR, as compared to not having the any 1st met at any given time point.
- Sample interpretation 2: Having 1st met in non-brain is associated with a 50% increased in hazard of LMD, adjusting for age, race, stage and PR, as compared to not having any 1st met at any given time point.


<!-- ```{r, echo = T, message = F, warning = F, results = 'asis', fig.width = 10, fig.height = 7} -->

<!--   scale_colour_manual(name  ="PR", values = c("#E7B800", "#2E9FDF")) + -->
<!--   labs(y = 'Survival Probability', title = 'Time from Brc to non-brain metastasis or LMD, using time-dependent PR') -->

<!-- ggadjustedcurves(cox_sub_PR, data = HD_first_met_PR, method = "conditional", variable="PR") + -->
<!--   scale_colour_manual(name  ="PR", values = c("#E7B800", "#2E9FDF")) + -->
<!--   labs(y = 'Survival Probability', title = 'Time from Brc to non-brain metastasis or LMD, using time-dependent PR') -->

<!-- ``` -->

<!-- ``` -->

<!-- ### iii. Examine subgroups (for those had first met after Brc) -->
<!-- ```{r, echo = T, message = F, warning = F} -->
<!-- descp <- HD_first_met %>% -->
<!--   group_by(`Starr ID`) %>% -->
<!--   mutate(n_pos = sum(ER == 'Positive', na.rm = T), -->
<!--          n_neg = sum(ER == 'Negative', na.rm = T)) %>% -->
<!--   mutate(ER_switch = case_when(n_neg == n() ~ "Always ER-", -->
<!--                                 n_pos == n() ~ "Always ER+", -->
<!--                                 n_neg != n() & n_pos != n() & n_neg != 0 & n_pos != 0 ~ "1 or multiple switch", -->
<!--                                T ~ 'NA ER')) -->

<!-- table((descp %>% -->
<!--   distinct(`Starr ID`, ER_switch, .keep_all = T))$ER_switch) -->

<!-- # multiple switch = 2; ER- to ER+ = 5; ER+ to ER- = 2 -->
<!-- switch <- HD_first_met %>% -->
<!--   filter(`Starr ID` %in% (descp %>% filter(ER_switch == '1 or multiple switch') %>% dplyr::select(`Starr ID`))$`Starr ID`) -->

<!-- ## 12B, 18, 55, 75, 7B -->
<!-- explore <- descp %>% -->
<!--   mutate(ER_switch = case_when(`Starr ID` %in% c('12B', '18', '55', '75', '7B') ~ 'ER+ to ER- for 1 time', -->
<!--                                `Starr ID` %in% c('41', '77') ~ 'ER- to ER+ for 1 time', -->
<!--                                `Starr ID` %in% c('8', '85') ~ 'Multiple Switch', -->
<!--                                T ~ ER_switch)) -->
<!-- ``` -->

<!-- - Among 1 or multiple switch group, we have **multiple switch = 2; ER+ to ER- = 5 (4 non-brain vs 1 brain); ER- to ER+ = 2**. I'm not sure what we can do with these small numbers. Summer, please feel free to make suggestions. -->
